scripts.db:push: npx prisma db push --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma --config apps/api/prisma.config.ts
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace apps/api && npm run lint --workspace apps/web
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace apps/api && npm run format --workspace apps/web
